requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer / Authorised Representative and Montenegrin/Serbian Language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 本地授权进口商/授权代表与黑山/塞尔维亚语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 本地授權進口商/授權代表與蒙特內哥羅/塞爾維亞語標注

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers placing radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment on the Montenegrin market must appoint a local authorised importer or authorised representative established in Montenegro. Montenegro is progressively adopting the EU RED framework obligations for economic operators, including the authorised representative model. The authorised importer or representative is responsible for ensuring the product holds a valid EKIP type approval / market notification and that product labelling and user documentation are in Montenegrin and/or Serbian (both Montenegrin Cyrillic/Latin script and Serbian are used; Montenegrin is the official language). Product labels must include the importer or representative name, address, and contact information. User manuals and safety instructions must be available in Montenegrin/Serbian. This is a hard market-access requirement with no exemption for EU or other foreign certificates.
summary.zh: 将无线电设备和电信终端设备投放黑山市场的境外制造商，须在黑山指定一名当地授权进口商或授权代表。黑山正逐步采纳欧盟RED框架对经营者的义务，包括授权代表模式。授权进口商或代表负责确保产品持有有效的EKIP型式核准/市场通知，并保证产品标签和用户文件使用黑山语和/或塞尔维亚语（黑山使用塞尔维亚/西里尔字母及拉丁字母，黑山语为官方语言）。产品标签须包含进口商或代表的名称、地址和联系方式。用户手册和安全说明须提供黑山语/塞尔维亚语版本。这是硬性市场准入要求，欧盟或其他境外证书均无豁免。
summary.zht: 將無線電設備和電信終端設備投放蒙特內哥羅市場的境外製造商，須在蒙特內哥羅指定一名當地授權進口商或授權代表。蒙特內哥羅正逐步採納歐盟RED框架對經營者的義務，包括授權代表模式。授權進口商或代表負責確保產品持有有效的EKIP型式核准/市場通知，並保證產品標籤和用戶文件使用蒙特內哥羅語和/或塞爾維亞語（蒙特內哥羅使用塞爾維亞/西里爾字母及拉丁字母，蒙特內哥羅語為官方語言）。產品標籤須包含進口商或代表的名稱、地址和聯繫方式。用戶手冊和安全說明須提供蒙特內哥羅語/塞爾維亞語版本。這是硬性市場准入要求，歐盟或其他境外證書均無豁免。

standards_or_laws: Law on Electronic Communications (Montenegro) — importer and authorised representative obligations
EKIP type approval / notification conditions — authorised importer / representative requirement
Law on Consumer Protection (Montenegro) — Montenegrin/Serbian language labelling obligation
EU RED framework (Radio Equipment Directive) — economic operator obligations being progressively adopted by Montenegro as part of EU accession process

summary.en: China does not require a locally-established importer for foreign wireless devices in the same way; instead, MIIT type approval (SRRC / NAL) is obtained by the manufacturer or their agent directly. Chinese-market product labelling is in Chinese (Mandarin) and must comply with GB standards for labelling content. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to the Montenegrin authorised importer / authorised representative obligation.
summary.zh: 中国对境外无线设备不以同样方式要求在华设立本地进口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由制造商或其代理直接申请。中国市场产品标注使用中文（普通话），须符合GB标准的标注内容要求。黑山授权进口商/授权代表义务在中国无直接对应项。
summary.zht: 中國對境外無線設備不以同樣方式要求在華設立本地進口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由製造商或其代理直接申請。中國市場產品標注使用中文（普通話），須符合GB標準的標注內容要求。蒙特內哥羅授權進口商/授權代表義務在中國無直接對應項。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — applicant may be manufacturer or authorised agent (no mandatory local importer entity required)
GB 5296.1-2012 — Instructions for use of consumer products (Chinese language labelling)
GB 7247 / GB 10408 product label GB content requirements

gap.en: China has no equivalent local-importer or authorised-representative mandate for the Montenegrin market. Manufacturers must establish or contract a legally-registered Montenegrin entity to act as authorised importer or authorised representative before EKIP type approval / notification can be activated for market placement. All product labelling and user documentation must be translated into Montenegrin/Serbian. This is an additional compliance step with no analogue in the SRRC/NAL process.
gap.zh: 中国针对黑山市场没有等效的本地进口商或授权代表强制要求。制造商须在EKIP型式核准/通知可用于市场投放前，建立或签约一家在黑山合法注册的实体作为授权进口商或授权代表。所有产品标签和用户文件须翻译成黑山语/塞尔维亚语。这是SRRC/NAL流程中没有对应项的额外合规步骤。
gap.zht: 中國針對蒙特內哥羅市場沒有等效的本地進口商或授權代表強制要求。製造商須在EKIP型式核准/通知可用於市場投放前，建立或簽約一家在蒙特內哥羅合法註冊的實體作為授權進口商或授權代表。所有產品標籤和用戶文件須翻譯成蒙特內哥羅語/塞爾維亞語。這是SRRC/NAL流程中沒有對應項的額外合規步驟。

source.publisher: EKIP — Agencija za elektronske komunikacije i poštansku djelatnost (Electronic Communications and Postal Agency, Montenegro)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Appointment of a locally-registered Montenegrin authorised importer or authorised representative and Montenegrin/Serbian language labelling of product and user documentation are mandatory for market access in Montenegro. There is no Chinese-side equivalent. These requirements must be addressed before the product can be sold in Montenegro, regardless of EKIP type approval / notification status. Verify specific importer registration and labelling obligations with a qualified Montenegrin legal or regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 指定在黑山注册的授权进口商或授权代表，以及产品和用户文件的黑山语/塞尔维亚语标注，是进入黑山市场的强制要求。中国方面无等效项。无论EKIP型式核准/通知状态如何，产品在黑山销售前须满足这些要求。请向合格的黑山法律或监管专业人士核实具体的进口商注册和标注义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 指定在蒙特內哥羅注冊的授權進口商或授權代表，以及產品和用戶文件的蒙特內哥羅語/塞爾維亞語標注，是進入蒙特內哥羅市場的強制要求。中國方面無等效項。無論EKIP型式核准/通知狀態如何，產品在蒙特內哥羅銷售前須滿足這些要求。請向合格的蒙特內哥羅法律或監管專業人士核實具體的進口商注冊和標注義務。
